ddls:
CREATE TABLE "covid_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "geo_code" TEXT /* Geographic code representing the region */,
  "topic" TEXT /* The topic of the data (e.g., Covid-19 cases, vaccinations) */,
  "date" TEXT /* The date the data was recorded */,
  "value" INTEGER /* The value associated with the data entry (e.g., number of cases) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the data source */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the individuals reported */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the individuals reported */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the individuals reported */,
  "is_confirmed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the case is confirmed */,
  "is_hospitalized" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the individual is hospitalized */,
  "is_deceased" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the individual has deceased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_geo_code FOREIGN KEY ("geo_code") REFERENCES regions ("geo_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_topic FOREIGN KEY ("topic") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "geo_code" TEXT /* Geographic code for the region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., state, country) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the region */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic (e.g., Covid-19 cases, vaccinations) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the topic is currently active or archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where vaccinations occurred */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the vaccinations were administered */,
  "vaccination_count" INTEGER /* Count of vaccinations administered on that date */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine administered (e.g., Pfizer, Moderna) */,
  "dose_number" INTEGER /* Number of the dose administered (1st, 2nd, booster) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the individuals vaccinated */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the individuals vaccinated */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the individuals vaccinated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for the demographic data (e.g., 18-24) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the demographic group */,
  "case_count" INTEGER /* Count of cases for the demographic group */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the demographic group */,
  "is_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the demographic group has been vaccinated */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the demographic group that has been vaccinated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role in the `roles` table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report detailing the analysis */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time the report was last modified */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the report is private or public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being analyzed */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis result (e.g., average, total) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the result */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm used for the analysis */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the analysis result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read, dismissed) */,
  "is_important" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the notification is important */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
